description: FIXED (flipped with the egress-renormalization fix, per the R12 rule; originally pinned the dangling-marker presentation). Provenance: live CLI session 2026-06-11, plan 2026-06-11-001. Construction: document_chunks loads 3 chunks; the pre-fetch (P-201 exact-id resolution) registers them as [1]..[3]. The single scripted completion cites [2] (valid) and [9] (beyond the 3-slot registry) inline and in the block. parse_response resolves [2] and drops [9] from the citations list; with the fix, _finalize_turn then strips the unresolvable literal [9] from the prose (fail-closed -- a marker that maps to no parsed citation never reaches the user) and renumbers the surviving [2] to [1], so the inline marker matches the single [1] source:page footer entry.
user_messages: What routine maintenance does P-201 need?

document_chunks.content: Inspect the impeller for cavitation damage every quarter.
Check coupling alignment annually or after any seal work.

turns.content:
Inspect the impeller for cavitation damage every quarter [2]. The vendor datasheet also recommends an annual instrument recalibration [9].
